name: Fugue
desc: A tactful foxian girl, whose appearance, name, and identity have all been stolen.\nThe fates have left her a thread of chance at survival, yet the brand of Destruction still writhes with anticipation.\nThe one in a fugue who has experienced life and death and is given a new life... when would she be able to return home?

1.name: Earthbound I Was, Cloudward I Be
1.desc: Ally target with "Foxian Prayer" increases their Weakness Break Efficiency by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

2.name: Beatitude Dawns for the Worthy
2.desc: When an enemy target's Weakness gets broken, Fugue regenerates <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> Energy. After using Ultimate, <u>advances the action</u> of all allies by <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak>.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

3.name: Verity Weaves Thoughts to Blade
3.desc: Skill Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nBasic ATK Lv. +1, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>10</unbreak>.

4.name: Bereft of Form, Which Name to Bear
4.desc: Ally target with "Foxian Prayer" increases their Break DMG dealt by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

5.name: Colored Cloud Rains Fortune
5.desc: Ultimate Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.\nTalent Lv. +2, up to a maximum of Lv. <unbreak>15</unbreak>.

6.name: Clairvoyance of Boom and Doom
6.desc: Increases Fugue's Weakness Break Efficiency by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. While Fugue is in the "Torrid Scorch" state, "Foxian Prayer" takes effect on all allies.

122501.name: Radiant Streak
122501.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Fugue's ATK to one designated enemy.
122501.simple_desc: Deals minor Fire DMG to one enemy.

122502.name: Virtue Beckons Bliss
122502.desc: Grants one designated ally "Foxian Prayer". Enters the "Torrid Scorch" state, lasting for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> turn(s). The duration decreases by 1 at the start of Fugue's every turn. "Foxian Prayer" only takes effect on the most recent target of Fugue's Skill.\nThe ally target with "Foxian Prayer" increases their Break Effect by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> and can also reduce Toughness even when attacking enemies that don't have the corresponding Weakness Type, with the effect equivalent to <unbreak>#6[i]%</unbreak> of the original Toughness Reduction value. This cannot stack with other Toughness Reduction effects that also ignore Weakness Type.\nWhile in the "Torrid Scorch" state, Fugue enhances her Basic ATK. Every time an ally target with "Foxian Prayer" attacks, Fugue has a <unbreak>#3[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to reduce the attacked enemy target's DEF by <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak></color>, lasting for <unbreak>#5[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
122502.simple_desc: Grants one ally "Foxian Prayer", which <color=#f29e38ff>increases Break Effect</color>, and <color=#f29e38ff>enables to reduce Toughness when attacking enemies that don't have the corresponding Weakness Type</color>.\nMakes this unit enter the "Torrid Scorch" state, enhancing Basic ATK. When ally units with "Foxian Prayer" attack, Fugue has a high chance to reduce the enemy target's DEF.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

122503.name: Solar Splendor Shines Upon All
122503.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Fugue's ATK to all enemies. This attack ignores Weakness Type to reduce all enemies' Toughness. And when breaking Weakness, triggers the Fire Weakness Break effect.
122503.simple_desc: Deals Fire DMG to all enemies. This attack <color=#f29e38ff>ignores Weakness Type</color> to reduce all enemies' Toughness.

122504.name: Fortune Follows Where Virtue Spreads
122504.desc: While Fugue is on the field, enemy targets will get additionally afflicted with "Cloudflame Luster," equal to <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> of their Max Toughness. When the initial Toughness is reduced to 0, "Cloudflame Luster" can continue to be reduced. When "Cloudflame Luster" is reduced to 0, the enemy will receive Weakness Break DMG again.\nWhile Fugue is on the field and after allies attack <u>Weakness Broken</u> enemy targets, converts the Toughness Reduction of this attack into 1 instance of <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> <u>Super Break DMG</u>.
122504.simple_desc: While Fugue is on the field, enemy targets will get <color=#f29e38ff>additionally afflicted with "Cloudflame Luster."</color> When "Cloudflame Luster" is reduced to 0, the enemy will <color=#f29e38ff>take Weakness Break DMG again</color>. After allies attack <u>Weakness Broken</u> enemy targets, additionally deals <color=#f29e38ff><u>Super Break DMG</u></color>.

10000006.name: Weakness Break State
10000006.desc: When enemy targets' Toughness is reduced to 0, they will enter the Weakness Break State, which delays their actions.

10000015.name: Super Break DMG
10000015.desc: Super Break DMG increases with higher Break Effect, higher Toughness Reduction of the attack, and higher character levels.\nSuper Break DMG cannot CRIT Hit and is not affected by DMG Boost effects.\nSuper Break DMG is also considered Break DMG.

122506.name: Attack
122506.desc: Attacks an enemy, and after entering combat, reduces their Toughness of the corresponding Type.

122507.name: Percipient Shine
122507.desc: After using Technique, inflicts Daze on enemies within a certain area, lasting for <unbreak>#1[i]</unbreak> second(s). While Dazed, enemies will not actively attack ally targets.\nAfter entering battle via actively attacking Dazed enemies, Fugue's <u>action advances</u> by <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak>, with a <unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak> <u>base chance</u> to inflict each enemy target with the same DEF Reduction state as that applied by Fugue's Skill, lasting for <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> turn(s).
122507.simple_desc: Inflicts Daze on enemies within a certain area. After entering battle via attacking Dazed enemies, Fugue's <u>action advances</u>, with a high chance to inflict each enemy target with the same DEF Reduction state as that applied by Fugue's Skill.

10000001.name: Action Advance
10000001.desc: Reduces the target's waiting interval before the next action.

30000001.name: Base Chance
30000001.desc: The base chance of applying debuffs to targets hit. \nThe final probability is affected by the attacker's Effect Hit Rate and enemy targets' Effect RES.

122508.name: Fiery Caress
122508.desc: Deals Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak></color> of Fugue's ATK to one designated enemy and Fire DMG equal to <color=#f29e38ff><unbreak>#2[i]%</unbreak></color> of Fugue's ATK to adjacent targets.
122508.simple_desc: Deals minor Fire DMG to one enemy and minor Fire DMG to adjacent targets.

1.point_desc: After ally targets break weakness, additionally <u>delays the action</u> of the enemy target by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>.

10000002.name: Delay Action
10000002.desc: Increases the target's waiting interval before the next action.

1.point_desc: Increases this unit's Break Effect by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. After using Skill for the first time, immediately recovers <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> Skill Point(s).

When an enemy target's Weakness gets broken, increases teammates' (i.e., excluding this unit) Break Effect by <unbreak>#1[i]%</unbreak>. If Fugue's Break Effect is <unbreak>#4[i]%</unbreak> or higher, the Break Effect increase is boosted by an additional <unbreak>#5[i]%</unbreak>, lasting for <unbreak>#2[i]</unbreak> turn(s). This effect can stack up to <unbreak>#3[i]</unbreak> time(s).
